title: salix neglecta
intro: Salix neglecta, also known as river willow or black willow, is a species of willow tree native to North America. The bark of the Salix neglecta tree contains salicin, a compound that has anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties, similar to aspirin. The medicinal properties of Salix neglecta have been used to treat various health issues, including fever reduction, pain relief, and inflammation, as well as to soothe digestive problems and reduce menstrual cramps. Salix neglecta can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, allowing for a range of herbal preparations that can be used to harness its medicinal benefits.
